description: Third-party resources that expose visitor IP addresses — fonts, embeds, CDNs, maps

*.cloudfront.net.note: AWS CloudFront CDN — leaks visitor IP and request headers to Amazon infrastructure and Lambda@Edge functions

*.deno.dev.note: Deno Deploy edge functions — serverless JavaScript runtime leaking visitor IP to deployed edge functions

*.netlify.app.note: Netlify-hosted sites and edge functions — visitor IP exposed to Netlify infrastructure

*.vercel.app.note: Vercel-hosted apps and edge functions — visitor IP exposed to Vercel infrastructure and deployed edge functions

*.workers.dev.note: Cloudflare Workers edge functions — custom code runs on Cloudflare edge, exposing visitor IP to worker logic

1inch.io.note: DEX aggregator — routes token swaps across multiple decentralized exchanges, collecting wallet addresses and transaction data

a.storyblok.com.note: ⚠ PHISHING RISK: Storyblok CDN is widely flagged as phishing in security databases (VirusTotal, PhishTank) because attackers abuse Storyblok free tier to host phishing pages. Legitimate CMS service but CDN domain has severely damaged reputation

abs.twimg.com.note: X/Twitter absolute asset CDN for embedded tweet widget resources — leaks visitor IP

acsbapp.com.note: accessiBe accessibility overlay app domain — collects page structure, user interaction patterns, and accessibility feature usage. Reveals disability-related browsing signals to third party.

ajax.aspnetcdn.com.note: Microsoft-hosted JS library CDN leaking visitor IP to Microsoft

ajax.googleapis.com.note: Google-hosted jQuery/Angular libraries CDN leaking visitor IP to Google

ajax.googleapis.com/ajax/libs/angularjs.note: Loading AngularJS from Google CDN leaks visitor IP to Google

akamaized.net.note: Akamai CDN requests expose visitor IP to Akamai edge infrastructure

analytics.belastingdienst.nl.note: Dutch tax authority analytics leaking citizen IP and tax portal browsing behavior

analytics.destatis.de.note: German Federal Statistical Office analytics leaking visitor IP for statistical portal tracking

api.fontshare.com.note: Fontshare free font CDN — leaks visitor IP for each font request; consider self-hosting fonts

api.iconify.design.note: Open-source icon API; every icon request leaks visitor IP to Iconify servers

api.stability.ai.note: Stability AI API — image generation prompts and outputs processed on Stability AI servers

sdk.amazonaws.com.note: AWS JavaScript SDK CDN leaking visitor IP to Amazon infrastructure

sdk.split.io.note: Split.io feature flag SDK — leaks visitor IP and user attributes for feature targeting and A/B testing

secure.gravatar.com.note: Gravatar avatar service leaking visitor email hashes and IP to Automattic

secure.quantserve.com.note: Quantcast measurement pixel — collects visitor data for audience measurement and interest-based advertising

sede.dgt.gob.es.note: Spanish Directorate General of Traffic — processes driving license and vehicle data

sede.sepe.gob.es.note: Spanish public employment service — processes unemployment benefits and jobseeker data

ssl.gstatic.com.note: Google SSL static asset CDN — leaks visitor IP to Google infrastructure

stackpath.bootstrapcdn.com.note: Legacy Bootstrap CDN hosted by StackPath; leaks visitor IP

stackpathcdn.com.note: StackPath/MaxCDN asset delivery — leaks visitor IP to StackPath

static.cloudflareinsights.com.note: Cloudflare Web Analytics beacon script — leaks visitor IP and page view data to Cloudflare

static.parastorage.com.note: Wix static asset CDN — all Wix-hosted sites load assets from this domain, leaking visitor IP to Wix for every page load

static.tiktokcdn.com.note: TikTok CDN leaks visitor IP and device info to ByteDance infrastructure

static.xx.fbcdn.net.note: Meta static asset CDN for Facebook embeds and social plugins — leaks visitor IP to Meta

static.zdassets.com.note: Zendesk support widget CDN leaking visitor IP and browsing context

statistics.rijksoverheid.nl.note: Dutch government Piwik/Matomo analytics transmitting citizen visitor data to government infrastructure

stats.bund.de.note: German government statistics — citizen IP addresses transmitted to government Matomo analytics infrastructure

stats.gouvernement.fr.note: French government statistics endpoint — citizen browsing data transmitted to DINUM-operated analytics

stats.impots.gouv.fr.note: French tax authority analytics leaking citizen IP and tax portal browsing behavior

stats.service-public.fr.note: French government Matomo analytics endpoint transmitting citizen browsing data to DINUM infrastructure

stats.wp.com.note: WordPress.com Jetpack stats endpoint — transmits page view data and visitor IP for WordPress site analytics

storage.cloud.google.com.note: Google Cloud Storage requests expose visitor IP to Google Cloud infrastructure

storage.de.cloud.ovh.net.note: OVHcloud object storage leaking visitor IP for static content delivery

storage.googleapis.com.note: Static asset requests leak visitor IP to Google Cloud Platform

tags.bluekai.com/site.note: Oracle BlueKai site-level data collection tag — leaks visitor IP and browsing behavior to Oracle's data cloud for audience profiling

tile.openstreetmap.org.note: OpenStreetMap tile server — leaks visitor IP; consider self-hosting tiles for full privacy compliance

ton.twimg.com.note: X/Twitter upload service CDN for media content — leaks visitor IP to X Corp

trafficmanager.net.note: Azure Traffic Manager DNS-based load balancing exposes visitor IP for routing decisions

translate.google.com.note: Google Translate widget transmits page content and visitor IP to Google for translation

trustwallet.com.note: Trust Wallet (Binance-owned) — mobile wallet that connects to Binance infrastructure for token data

twemoji.maxcdn.com.note: Twitter emoji CDN — leaks visitor IP when loading Twemoji graphics on web pages

ucas.com.note: UK university admissions service — processes student applications, grades, and personal statements

unpkg.com.note: npm package CDN (Cloudflare-backed) — leaks visitor IP when loading JavaScript packages from npm

unpkg.com/htmx.org.note: Loading htmx from unpkg leaks visitor IP to Cloudflare

unpkg.com/vue.note: Loading Vue.js from unpkg leaks visitor IP to Cloudflare

upload.wikimedia.org.note: Wikimedia Commons media CDN leaking visitor IP for encyclopedia image delivery

uploads-ssl.webflow.com.note: Webflow uploads CDN — leaks visitor IP for media file delivery on Webflow-hosted websites

use.fontawesome.com.note: Font Awesome Kit CDN with usage analytics — tracks which icons are used on which sites

use.typekit.net.note: Adobe Fonts (formerly Typekit) — leaks visitor IP and referrer for web font delivery; tracks font usage across sites

user-images.githubusercontent.com.note: GitHub user-uploaded image hosting exposes viewer IP to Microsoft/GitHub

utteranc.es.note: GitHub Issues-based commenting widget — leaks visitor IP to utterances and GitHub

vitals.vercel-insights.com.note: Vercel Web Analytics and Speed Insights — collects Core Web Vitals and visitor data for deployed sites

w.soundcloud.com.note: SoundCloud embedded player widget — leaks visitor IP and sets tracking cookies

web.app.note: Firebase-hosted sites expose visitor IP to Google Cloud

webanalytics.bund.de.note: Self-hosted Matomo analytics for German federal websites; IP data stays in EU

webtools.europa.eu/analytics.note: EU Commission extended analytics endpoint transmitting citizen browsing data from EU institution sites

widget.accuweather.com.note: AccuWeather widget leaks visitor IP for geolocation-based weather display — AccuWeather previously caught sharing location data without consent

widget.intercom.io.note: Intercom messenger widget leaks visitor IP and browsing context before any interaction

widget.trustpilot.com.note: Trustpilot review widget CDN — leaks visitor IP and browsing context when loading review scores

widget.wechat.com.note: WeChat widget leaks visitor IP to Tencent servers in China

widgets.shopifyapps.com.note: Shopify embedded app widgets leak visitor IP to Shopify infrastructure

widgets.weather.com.note: Weather widget embeds leak visitor IP and location data to IBM's Weather Company infrastructure for weather display and ad targeting

wormhole.com.note: Cross-chain bridge protocol — tracks wallet addresses and bridged asset transfers across blockchains

www.agenciatributaria.gob.es.note: Spanish tax agency portal — processes citizen tax filings, VAT declarations, and financial data

www.agenziaentrate.gov.it.note: Italian revenue agency — processes tax declarations, property records, and fiscal data

www.borger.dk.note: Danish citizen self-service portal — browsing reveals administrative needs across Danish government services

www.cartoonnetwork.com.note: Cartoon Network children's website — embeds Google Analytics, social widgets, and ad trackers on pages targeted at children

www.disneychannel.com.note: Disney Channel children's content — Disney digital properties embed multiple advertising and analytics trackers on children's content pages

www.dvla.gov.uk.note: UK Driver and Vehicle Licensing Agency — processes driving license and vehicle registration data

www.google.com.note: Cross-origin requests to www.google.com on a non-Google site are almost always reCAPTCHA (/recaptcha/api.js), Google Fonts CSS, OAuth/Login, or Maps — all leak visitor IP to Google regardless of consent

www.google.com/ccm/collect.note: Google Customer Match Connect — first-party data ingest endpoint. Sends hashed PII (emails, phone numbers) plus event metadata to Google Ads for audience matching. Used by consent-mode-aware deployments to bypass third-party cookie restrictions

www.google.com/gmp/conversion.note: Google Marketing Platform Enhanced Conversions — sends hashed PII (typically email + name) as URL parameters for cross-device conversion attribution

www.google.com/pagead/1p-conversion.note: Google Ads First-Party Conversion endpoint — server-side-style conversion reporting through the visitor's browser. Consent-mode workaround that bypasses third-party-cookie restrictions

www.google.com/pagead/1p-user-list.note: Google Ads First-Party Audience List — the '1p' is literal. Successor to third-party-cookie-based audience targeting after Chrome's Privacy Sandbox transition. Sends visitor data to Google Ads to maintain audience membership

www.google.com/rmkt/collect.note: Google Ads Remarketing collect endpoint — fires for retargeting audience membership. Equivalent to a remarketing pixel via the gtag library

www.gov.uk.note: UK government services portal — browsing patterns reveal benefit claims, visa applications, tax filings, and health needs

www.gov.uk/dwp.service: UK Department for Work and Pensions
www.gov.uk/dwp.note: UK benefits and social security portal — browsing reveals claimant status and benefit types

www.gstatic.com.note: Google static asset CDN — leaks visitor IP to Google on every page load

www.inps.it.note: Italian national social security institute — processes pension, disability, and benefit claim data

www.instagram.com.note: Embedded Instagram content transmits visitor data to Meta

www.instagram.com/embed.note: Instagram embeds leak visitor IP and behavior data to Meta for ad targeting

www.nhs.uk.note: NHS website — health information searches reveal medical conditions and health concerns to NHS Digital

www.nick.com.note: Nickelodeon children's website — Viacom fined $4.95M by FTC in 2019 for COPPA violations collecting personal data from children under 13 on Nick.com

www.npmjs.com.note: npm package registry website leaks visitor IP to Microsoft/GitHub infrastructure

www.parcoursup.fr.note: French higher education admission platform — processes student academic records and university preferences

www.paypal.com/sdk/js.note: PayPal JavaScript SDK — leaks visitor IP and device info to PayPal on page load; consider lazy-loading at checkout

www.paypalobjects.com.note: PayPal static resource CDN for payment buttons and checkout widgets

www.roblox.com/tracking.note: Roblox children's gaming platform — FTC investigated Roblox for COPPA compliance. Platform collects extensive behavioral data from children including chat logs, purchase history, and play patterns.

www.service-public.fr.note: French government services portal — browsing reveals administrative needs and life events

www.suomi.fi.note: Finnish government digital services portal — citizen authentication and e-government services

www.tiktok.com.note: Embedded TikTok content transmits visitor data to ByteDance servers

www.tiktok.com/embed.note: TikTok embeds leak visitor IP and device fingerprint to ByteDance servers

www.youtube-nocookie.com.note: Privacy-enhanced embed mode — still leaks IP but no tracking cookies

www.youtube.com.note: Standard YouTube embed sets cookies and leaks IP; use youtube-nocookie.com instead

yastatic.net.note: Yandex CDN leaks visitor IP to Russian infrastructure

youtube.com.note: Embedded YouTube content transmits visitor data to Google; use youtube-nocookie.com for privacy-enhanced mode
